sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 2:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 2:1
items.html: Two phases of light are contained in each record: The first is a residue of direct light; the second is a residue of reflected light, that a residue of direct light is clothed in it. The part of the direct light of the record is called the “prime light” in it, and the part of the reflected light of the record is called the “poor light” in it. (Item 50, and Inner Light there)
